title: Protect Victims of Digital Exploitation and Manipulation Act of 2025
short_title: Protect Victims of Digital Exploitation and Manipulation Act of 2025
plain_summary: This bill makes it illegal to create or share fake naked pictures or videos of real people without asking them first. If someone breaks this law, they could go to jail for up to five years and have to pay fines. The law does not apply to police doing their jobs, doctors, or people reporting crimes. The law works when the fake pictures are shared between different states or involve American citizens.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.

sections.title: Section 1 Short Title
sections.text: This law can be called the Protect Victims of Digital Exploitation and Manipulation Act of two thousand twenty-five.

sections.title: Section 2 Digital Forgeries of Intimate Visual Depictions
sections.text: This section adds a new crime to federal law about creating or sharing fake intimate images of real people. It makes it illegal to create or share fake intimate pictures or videos of someone without their permission when the person doesn't care about whether they're hurting someone. A digital forgery means any intimate picture or video of a person that was made using computer software, artificial intelligence, or machine learning to make it look like a real picture of that person. An intimate visual depiction means a picture or video that shows someone's private body parts, sexual fluids, or someone doing sexual acts. An identifiable individual means a person who can be recognized in the picture by their face or other features like birthmarks. The punishment for this crime is a fine, up to five years in prison, or both. There are some exceptions to this law. It does not apply when someone shares these images in good faith to law enforcement, as part of a court case, for medical reasons, or when reporting illegal content or unwelcome behavior. The law also does not apply to communication service providers unless they carelessly share content that breaks this law. This law applies when the fake images are made or shared using methods that cross state lines or involve foreign countries. It also applies if either the person who commits the crime or the victim is a United States citizen. Consent means that a person freely agreed to something without being forced, tricked, or pressured, even if they are a famous person. Communications service includes phone companies, internet services, and websites where people can post content. Information content provider means someone who creates or develops information for the internet.

sections.title: Section 3 Severability
sections.text: If any part of this law is found to be against the Constitution, the rest of the law will still be valid and enforceable. Each part of this law can stand on its own.
